professor.name: WANG Yizhuo
professor.title: Assistant Professor
professor.biography_text: Yizhuo Wang received the Ph.D. degree in computer science from Beijing Institute of Technology, China, in 2005. He was a visiting scholar at University of California, Irvine from 2010 to 2011. He is a member of ACM, IEEE and CCF.

experiences.raw_text: Yizhuo Wang received the Ph.D. degree in computer science from Beijing Institute of Technology, China, in 2005.
